unit.name: Why 3D deep learning needed new data and task formulations
unit.description: Places 3D deep learning in historical context, covering why voxels were the first entry point, which datasets enabled progress, and what tasks matter in AI+geometry.
unit.summary: Wu situates 3D deep learning historically after the 2D successes of ImageNet-era CNNs, noting that the first instinct was to lift 2D convolutions into 3D by operating on voxel grids because voxels most closely resemble pixels [ts=1679s][ts=1721s][ts=1730s]. He then argues that methods alone were not enough; progress required larger 3D datasets, moving from small benchmarks like the Princeton Shape Benchmark to ShapeNet and ShapeNetCore, and later to Objaverse-scale collections of synthetic assets, while real scanned scene datasets remained much smaller and more expensive to collect [ts=1781s][ts=1852s][ts=1863s][ts=1910s][ts=2120s]. The segment ends by broadening the task space: 3D learning includes generative modeling, conditional reconstruction from images or language, completion and repair, discriminative recognition, and especially joint 2D–3D modeling that exploits abundant 2D data and differentiable rendering to transfer priors from image models into 3D pipelines [ts=2165s][ts=2188s][ts=2231s][ts=2258s].

key_points.text: Early 3D deep learning started by extending 2D convolution into volumetric convolution on voxels.
ShapeNet provided a large-scale 3D object dataset, with ShapeNetCore serving as the commonly used subset.
Objaverse and Objaverse-XL expanded 3D asset scale to roughly millions of models.
3D scene datasets are much smaller than object datasets because scanning real spaces is costly.
Core 3D learning tasks include generation, reconstruction, completion, classification, and joint 2D–3D modeling.

kp_catalog.name: Level sets and voxels
kp_catalog.description: Grid-based discretizations of implicit fields, with voxels storing binarized occupancy values on a 3D lattice.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because level sets and voxels clarifies grid-based discretizations of implicit fields, with voxels storing binarized occupancy values on a 3D lattice, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.

kp_catalog.name: 3D datasets and AI+geometry task space
kp_catalog.description: The data and problem formulations that enabled 3D learning, including large object datasets, scanned scene data, and generative/discriminative/multimodal tasks.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because 3D datasets and AI+geometry task space clarifies the data and problem formulations that enabled 3D learning, including large object datasets, scanned scene data, and generative/discriminative/multimodal tasks, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.
